Name: Riverside Park Cleanup
Description: Help clean up litter, plant native trees, and restore walking trails along the riverbank.

Name: Virtual Tutoring Buddies
Description: Tutor middle school students online in math, science, or reading through weekly virtual sessions.
Requirements: High school students, reliable Wi-Fi, Zoom access

Name: Animal Shelter Media Team
Description: Create social media posts and adoption flyers for rescued pets to help them find homes.
Requirements: Basic design or social media skills, remote or onsite

Name: Community Garden Assistant
Description: Help maintain vegetable plots, compost stations, and host sustainability workshops.

Name: Arts for All Youth Program
Description: Assist in after-school art workshops for elementary students—painting, crafts, and theater games.

Name: Teen Mental Health Ambassadors
Description: Help design mental wellness campaigns and participate in awareness events at local schools.

Name: STEM Mentorship Program
Description: Pair up with younger students to explore coding, robotics, and science experiments.
Requirements: Basic STEM interest, weekdays after school

Name: Library Reading Companion
Description: Read aloud to children and help organize weekend storytime sessions.

Name: Food Bank Organizer
Description: Sort, pack, and distribute food donations to families in need in your community.
Requirements: Can lift up to 25 lbs, in-person

Name: EcoTech Recycling Drive
Description: Support an electronic recycling campaign by collecting old devices and spreading awareness online.

Name: Senior Tech Helpers
Description: Teach senior citizens how to use smartphones, email, and video calls to stay connected with family.

Name: Wildlife Habitat Restoration
Description: Assist in restoring local wetlands and planting native species to improve wildlife habitats.

Name: Museum Docent Volunteer
Description: Lead visitors through exhibits, share interesting facts, and assist in event setup.

Name: Coding for Kids Club
Description: Teach elementary students basic coding concepts through fun games and challenges.
Requirements: Basic Python or Scratch knowledge, in-person or virtual

Name: Youth Leadership Workshop
Description: Support and mentor middle school students during weekend leadership and confidence-building events.

Name: Community Art Mural Project
Description: Collaborate with artists to design and paint a public mural celebrating local culture and diversity.

Name: Animal Therapy Visits
Description: Accompany therapy animals on visits to nursing homes and schools to provide comfort and smiles.

Name: Homework Help Hotline
Description: Provide remote homework help for younger students via chat or video sessions after school.

Name: Neighborhood Clean Streets Team
Description: Work with local residents to clean public areas, paint benches, and plant flowers in shared spaces.

Name: Senior Story Recording Project
Description: Interview seniors in your community and record their life stories for a digital history archive.
Requirements: Good listening skills, recording device or phone
